allow: Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const runs = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); runs.forEach\(r => console.log\(r.number.toString\(\).padStart\(4\) + ' | ' + \(r.conclusion || 'running'\).padEnd\(10\) + ' | ' + r.displayTitle.slice\(0, 70\)\)\); }\); ")
